CustomField.description:
Home Owners Association or Condo Dues, if any, at the time of purchase. This field does not sync with the Property Fee records which tracks this value over time. Create a separate Fee record to track annual changes.
Please note: The data stored in this field is linked to the HomeKeeper National Data Hub. Do not change this field or hide it from the layout.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Home Owners Association, Condo Dues, or Lot Rent/Pad Fee if any, at the time of purchase. This field does not sync with the Property Fee records which tracks this value over time. Create a separate Fee record to track annual changes.
CustomField.label: HOA/Condo Dues
